chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI I.A. No.71 of 2021 (Hussain Shah v. Muhammad Noushad & another) Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Nazir Report dated 20.12.2022. 2. For orders on office objection a/w reply at ‘A’. 3. For hearing of CMA No.27870/2022. 4. For hearing of CMA No.4156/2022. 25.4.2024 None present for Appellant ************* Since last two dates the Appellant and his counsel are called absent and today is the third date. This is almost 12.15 p.m. there is no intimation either. Dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Shakeel, PS.
